---
title: "Glossary"
subtitle: "The type registry, rendered from `data/types.yml`"
---

This page is generated by `tools/gen-glossary.py` from `data/types.yml`. The
registry is the single source of truth; this file is a deterministic projection
of it. Edit the data, not this page.

## Live

### EntityCommandBuffer {#entitycommandbuffer}

`Unity.Entities`

Deferred structural-change recorder. ParallelWriter form is the safe path for per-entity writes inside parallel jobs.


### IBufferElementData {#ibufferelementdata}

`Unity.Entities`

Element of a DynamicBuffer. Entity fields are remapped automatically during baking.


### IComponentData {#icomponentdata}

`Unity.Entities`

Unmanaged value-type component. Entity fields are remapped automatically during baking.


### IDynamicHashMap {#idynamichashmap}

`BovineLabs.Core.Iterators`

Hash map stored in opaque buffer bytes. Entity values inside are invisible to TypeManager and are not remapped during baking.


### IEnableableComponent {#ienableablecomponent}

`Unity.Entities`

Component whose presence and enabled state are distinct. Drives the WithAll vs WithPresent vs WithDisabled distinction.


### IJobFor {#ijobfor}

`Unity.Jobs`

Required interface for ScheduleParallel under Unity 6. IJobParallelFor does not extend it.


### ISystem {#isystem}

`Unity.Entities`

Unmanaged system struct. Absent from world.Systems enumeration; verify by query effect, not by listing systems.


### LocalToWorld {#localtoworld}

`Unity.Entities`

World-space float4x4 produced by the transform system. Read for rendering and world queries.


### LocalTransform {#localtransform}

`Unity.Entities`

Entity local-space position, rotation, and uniform scale. The single source of transform truth in modern Entities.


### Parent {#parent}

`Unity.Entities`

Reference to a parent entity. Hierarchy edge replacing the old LocalToParent component.


### PostTransformMatrix {#posttransformmatrix}

`Unity.Entities`

Baked diagonal scale matrix applied after LocalTransform. Compounds with parent scale chains on reparent.


### SubScene {#subscene}

`Unity.Scenes`

Component on a parent-scene GameObject pointing at a subscene asset whose authoring GameObjects bake into entities.


### UnsafeBufferLookup {#unsafebufferlookup}

`BovineLabs.Core.Iterators`

Parallel-write-capable buffer access used with NativeDisableParallelForRestriction.


### UnsafeComponentLookup {#unsafecomponentlookup}

`BovineLabs.Core.Iterators`

Aliasing-free component access for parallel jobs. No GetRefRW; read-modify-write via indexer. Constructed through the SystemState extension.


## Dead

### ExtractLocalTransform {#extractlocaltransform}

`Unity.Mathematics`

No such float4x4 method. Decompose a matrix with LocalTransform.FromMatrix.

> Use instead: `LocalTransform.FromMatrix(matrix)`


### GetBuiltinMaterial {#getbuiltinmaterial}

`UnityEngine`

Never existed as called. Construct materials from a found shader instead.

> Use instead: `new Material(Shader.Find("Standard"))`


### LocalToParent {#localtoparent}

`Unity.Entities`

Removed in modern Entities. Express hierarchy with Parent plus LocalTransform.

> Use instead: `Parent, LocalTransform, LocalToWorld`
